Example_EN: My grandmother taught me how to bake bread.
Example_CN: 奶奶教我烤面包。

Collocation: jury trial;serve on a jury;jury decide
Example_EN: The jury reached a verdict after three hours.
Example_CN: 陪审团三小时后作出裁决。

Example_EN: The project needs close cooperation between teams.
Example_CN: 该项目需要团队间密切合作。

Example_EN: Many civilians left the city during the fighting.
Example_CN: 战斗期间许多平民离开了城市。

Example_EN: Students must write a short composition tonight.
Example_CN: 学生今晚必须写一篇短作文。

Collocation: gold coin;toss a coin;coin a phrase
Example_EN: I found an old coin under the floorboard.
Example_CN: 我在地板下发现一枚旧硬币。

Example_EN: We will go ahead regardless of the weather.
Example_CN: 不管天气如何我们都会继续。

Example_EN: Please scan the document and send it by email.
Example_CN: 请扫描文件并用邮件发送。

Example_EN: She bought a bunch of flowers for her mother.
Example_CN: 她给妈妈买了一束花。

Example_EN: Laws protect people against racial discrimination.
Example_CN: 法律保护人们免受种族歧视。

Collocation: greet guests;greet with a smile;warmly greet
Example_EN: She stood by the door to greet the guests.
Example_CN: 她站在门口迎接客人。

Example_EN: Hopefully the rain will stop before the match.
Example_CN: 但愿比赛前雨会停。

Example_EN: The council may impose sanctions on the company.
Example_CN: 理事会可能对该公司实施制裁。

Example_EN: Don't fall for that old sales trick.
Example_CN: 别上那个老套推销伎俩的当。

Collocation: first paragraph;write a paragraph;paragraph of text
Example_EN: Start each new idea in a new paragraph.
Example_CN: 每个新观点另起一段。

Example_EN: She works as a film maker in London.
Example_CN: 她在伦敦做电影制作人。

Example_EN: He bought a bar of dark chocolate for dessert.
Example_CN: 他买了一块黑巧克力当甜点。

Example_EN: Teachers try to stimulate students' curiosity.
Example_CN: 教师努力激发学生的好奇心。

Example_EN: Please fasten your seat belt before we drive.
Example_CN: 开车前请系好安全带。

Example_EN: We had baked potato with cheese for lunch.
Example_CN: 午餐我们吃了奶酪烤土豆。

Example_EN: Her personal narrative moved the whole audience.
Example_CN: 她的个人叙述打动了全体听众。

Example_EN: She wiped her eyes with a paper tissue.
Example_CN: 她用纸巾拭去眼泪。

Example_EN: He can barely see without his glasses.
Example_CN: 没眼镜他几乎看不见。

Collocation: invent a machine;invent a story;newly invent
Example_EN: Who invented the first practical light bulb?
Example_CN: 谁发明了第一只实用灯泡？

Example_EN: Tourism brings jobs to the coastal towns.
Example_CN: 旅游业为海滨小镇带来就业。

Example_EN: List the pros and cons before you decide.
Example_CN: 决定前先列出利弊。

Collocation: flight of stairs;wooden stair;up the stairs
Example_EN: Be careful on the wet stair by the door.
Example_CN: 小心门口那级湿楼梯。
MemoryTip: stair：梯级；stairs 常指整段楼梯。

Example_EN: Do not hesitate to ask if you need help.
Example_CN: 需要帮助时请不要犹豫来问。

Example_EN: The sun will shine after the morning fog lifts.
Example_CN: 晨雾散后阳光会照耀。

Example_EN: Praise can increase a child's motivation to learn.
Example_CN: 表扬能增强孩子的学习动力。

Example_EN: They booked a romantic dinner by the river.
Example_CN: 他们订了河边一次浪漫晚餐。

Example_EN: She firmly believes that practice brings progress.
Example_CN: 她坚信练习带来进步。

Example_EN: The interior of the old house needs repair.
Example_CN: 老房子内部需要修缮。

Example_EN: Do not swim on an empty stomach.
Example_CN: 不要空着肚子游泳。

Collocation: nowhere to go;nowhere near;out of nowhere
Example_EN: My keys were nowhere to be found this morning.
Example_CN: 今天早上钥匙怎么找也找不到。

Example_EN: They gather each evening to pray for peace.
Example_CN: 他们每晚聚会祈求和平。

Example_EN: Our team won the national championship last year.
Example_CN: 我们队去年赢得了全国锦标赛。

Example_EN: In the novel, a loyal servant saves the family.
Example_CN: 小说里忠诚的仆人救了全家。

Example_EN: Many immigrant families opened shops on this street.
Example_CN: 许多移民家庭在这条街开了店。

Example_EN: Do not drink alcohol in excess of the limit.
Example_CN: 饮酒不要超过限量。

Example_EN: The complexity of the rules confuses new users.
Example_CN: 规则的复杂性让新用户困惑。

Example_EN: The company accepted liability for the damage.
Example_CN: 公司承担了损坏责任。

Example_EN: The test was surprisingly easy for most students.
Example_CN: 这次测试对多数学生出奇地简单。

Example_EN: Scientists extract oil from certain plants.
Example_CN: 科学家从某些植物中提取油脂。

Example_EN: Full implementation of the plan will take a year.
Example_CN: 计划全面实施需要一年。

Example_EN: Good judges try to decide without bias.
Example_CN: 好法官力求裁决不带偏见。

Example_EN: They see the same event quite differently.
Example_CN: 他们对同一事件看法截然不同。

Example_EN: Look up the price in the product catalog.
Example_CN: 请在产品目录里查价格。

Example_EN: There was continuous rain for three days.
Example_CN: 连下了三天雨。

Example_EN: This job offer is a golden opportunity for her.
Example_CN: 这份工作邀请对她是绝佳机会。

Example_EN: I need a stamp to post this letter.
Example_CN: 寄这封信我需要一张邮票。

Example_EN: Please follow the safety guidelines in the lab.
Example_CN: 请遵守实验室安全指南。

Collocation: brown envelope;seal the envelope;inside the envelope
Example_EN: Put the card in a brown envelope and seal it.
Example_CN: 把贺卡放进棕色信封并封好。

Example_EN: Use a sharp knife to cut the vegetables.
Example_CN: 用锋利的刀切蔬菜。

Example_EN: The samples need careful biological testing.
Example_CN: 这些样本需要仔细的生物学检测。

Example_EN: Cars consume less fuel than they did twenty years ago.
Example_CN: 汽车现在比二十年前更省油。

Example_EN: A weekend at that luxury hotel costs a fortune.
Example_CN: 那家豪华酒店度周末贵得惊人。

Example_EN: We have a weekly meeting every Monday morning.
Example_CN: 我们每周一早上开例会。

Example_EN: Wherever you go, take your passport with you.
Example_CN: 不论你去哪里，都带上护照。

Example_EN: Don't bite into that apple before washing it.
Example_CN: 洗干净前不要咬那苹果。

Example_EN: The office printer has run out of black ink.
Example_CN: 办公室打印机黑色墨水用完了。

Example_EN: Firstly, check that all doors are locked.
Example_CN: 首先，检查所有门是否锁好。

Example_EN: She felt anxious about the exam results.
Example_CN: 她对考试成绩感到焦虑。

Example_EN: Their trip through the desert was a great adventure.
Example_CN: 他们穿越沙漠的旅程是一场大冒险。

Collocation: garden fence;fence off;sit on the fence
Example_EN: They built a wooden fence around the garden.
Example_CN: 他们在花园周围筑了木栅栏。

Example_EN: The long climb will exhaust even strong hikers.
Example_CN: 漫长攀登会让即使强壮的徒步者也筋疲力尽。

Example_EN: The castle is the town's main tourist attraction.
Example_CN: 城堡是该镇主要旅游景点。

Example_EN: They sailed across the ocean for three weeks.
Example_CN: 他们在海上航行了三周。

Example_EN: Please leave quietly so the baby can sleep.
Example_CN: 请安静离开，好让宝宝睡觉。

Example_EN: We visited a medieval castle by the river.
Example_CN: 我们参观了河边一座中世纪城堡。

Example_EN: The war veteran spoke about peace at school.
Example_CN: 那位退伍军人在学校谈和平。

Collocation: reflection in the mirror;moment of reflection;careful reflection
Example_EN: After quiet reflection, she changed her mind.
Example_CN: 静心思考后她改变了主意。

Collocation: lose your nerve;nerve cell;get on someone's nerves
Example_EN: He almost lost his nerve before the speech.
Example_CN: 演讲前他几乎失去勇气。

Example_EN: Her determination to succeed impressed everyone.
Example_CN: 她成功的决心给大家留下深刻印象。

Example_EN: There were twelve people altogether at dinner.
Example_CN: 晚餐一共有十二个人。
MemoryTip: all + together 合写：总共/完全。

Collocation: science fiction;works of fiction;fact and fiction
Example_EN: She prefers science fiction to romantic novels.
Example_CN: 比起言情小说她更爱科幻。

Example_EN: They laid a soft new carpet in the bedroom.
Example_CN: 他们在卧室铺了柔软新地毯。

Example_EN: A cluster of students waited outside the hall.
Example_CN: 一群学生在大厅外等候。

Example_EN: Unclear instructions caused confusion in the class.
Example_CN: 指示不清引起全班困惑。

Example_EN: We must hurry or we will miss the train.
Example_CN: 我们必须抓紧，不然会误火车。

Collocation: logical logic;faulty logic;logic of the argument
Example_EN: I could not follow the logic of his argument.
Example_CN: 我跟不上他论证的逻辑。

Example_EN: The new tax plan remains highly controversial.
Example_CN: 新税收计划仍极具争议。

Example_EN: Never eat raw chicken; always cook it well.
Example_CN: 绝不要吃生鸡肉，一定要煮熟。

Example_EN: She checked the essay for grammar mistakes.
Example_CN: 她检查作文的语法错误。

Collocation: revise for exams;revise a draft;revise your plan
Example_EN: Students revise for exams in the library.
Example_CN: 学生在图书馆复习迎考。

Example_EN: The teacher gave a helpful hint about the answer.
Example_CN: 老师给了一个有用的答题提示。

Collocation: off the hook;hook and line;hook up
Example_EN: Hang your coat on the hook by the door.
Example_CN: 把外套挂在门边的钩上。

Example_EN: Please ring the bell if nobody answers the door.
Example_CN: 若没人应门请按门铃。

Example_EN: Water is a liquid at room temperature.
Example_CN: 水在室温下是液体。

Collocation: in a panic;panic attack;do not panic
Example_EN: Do not panic if the fire alarm sounds; walk out calmly.
Example_CN: 火警响起时不要慌，冷静走出。

Example_EN: My uncle picks me up from school on Fridays.
Example_CN: 周五舅舅来学校接我。

Example_EN: We had steamed rice with fish for dinner.
Example_CN: 晚餐我们吃了蒸米饭配鱼。

Example_EN: The house sits on a gentle slope above the river.
Example_CN: 房子建在河上方的缓坡上。

Example_EN: True happiness often comes from simple moments.
Example_CN: 真正的幸福常来自简单瞬间。

Example_EN: Her apology showed genuine concern for others.
Example_CN: 她的道歉显示出对他人的真心关切。

Example_EN: A large sailing vessel entered the harbour at dawn.
Example_CN: 一艘大帆船黎明时驶入港口。

Example_EN: Underline every verb in the first sentence.
Example_CN: 在第一句里给每个动词加下划线。

Example_EN: I reckon we will arrive before dark.
Example_CN: 我觉得天黑前我们能到。

Example_EN: It was a silly mistake to leave the keys inside.
Example_CN: 把钥匙落在里面是个傻错误。

Example_EN: Public transportation in the city is cheap and frequent.
Example_CN: 该市公共交通便宜且班次多。
